Using Tailwind CSS and daisyUI, it is ex: Using Tailwind CSS and daisyUI, it is expected for CSS files to be very small. Ideally only the class names you used must be in the CSS file. Sometimes (specially in monorepos) it is possible that Tailwind CSS automatic class name detection finds some unwanted strings in your project and generate styles for them. To avoid this, you can disable automatic detection and register your source files using `@source` directive.

Generate unlimited and accurate daisyUI: Generate unlimited and accurate daisyUI code, with any code editor, any LLM
If you open an LLM and simply ask for UI: If you open an LLM and simply ask for UI code, you're probably going to get broken, outdated or mediocre results. But why is that?
To generate a good looking UI, LLM needs: To generate a good looking UI, LLM needs:
List of all available components and the: List of all available components and their specs
Design tokens, colors, states, variants: Design tokens, colors, states, variants and variables
I see, let's put them all in a 600KB .md: I see, let's put them all in a 600KB .md file and give it to LLM.
Providing too much context won't work ei: Providing too much context won't work either.
LLM will ignore most of it, hallucinates: LLM will ignore most of it, hallucinates the rest and lies to you about it.
MCP (Model Context Protocol) is an API p: MCP (Model Context Protocol) is an API protocol for AI to get accurate, reliable context information on demand, instead of guessing or searching through irrelevant data everytime.
The official daisyUI Blueprint MCP serve: The official daisyUI Blueprint MCP server provide
to the LLM, using MCP tools, MCP prompts: to the LLM, using MCP tools, MCP prompts and MCP resources.
No more guessworks, no hallucinations, n: No more guessworks, no hallucinations, no outdated syntax.
because LLM gains access to the correct: because LLM gains access to the correct context right away instead of reading a big llms.txt file or searching the web for random pages, or guessing the results based on outdated info.
Providing the right context at the right: Providing the right context at the right time means fast, efficient, and accurate results. The LLM receives exactly what it needs, which means
Docs, specs, class names, variants, vari: Docs, specs, class names, variants, variables
This will guarantee an accurate and effi: This will guarantee an accurate and efficient result, without guessworks or hallucinations.
Blueprint MCP server provides curated da: Blueprint MCP server provides curated daisyUI code snippets to your LLM
of the components to help the LLM better: of the components to help the LLM better understand the design system, and generate a more accurate code.

whether if you used the official daisyUI: whether if you used the official daisyUI Figma library or not. AI will understand the context of the elements and generate the closest possible daisyUI code.
For example if have a login form in Figm: For example if have a login form in Figma made with Material design, AI will still be able to generate the equivalent daisyUI code for it!
The accuracy of the generated code depen: The accuracy of the generated code depends on the complexity of the design.
For best result, convert smaller pieces: For best result, convert smaller pieces of the design at a time, instead of the whole page.
This is a detailed prompt that generates: This is a detailed prompt that generates daisyUI + Tailwind CSS code from a screenshot.
The prompt guides the AI to analyze the: The prompt guides the AI to analyze the screenshot, identify UI components, and generate the corresponding daisyUI code using existing daisyUI components which will be received from daisyUI Blueprint MCP server.
This works with any screenshot of a web: This works with any screenshot of a web UI
whether it's from a design tool, a live: whether it's from a design tool, a live website, or a mobile app. AI will understand the context of the elements and generate the closest daisyUI code.
The accuracy of the generated code depen: The accuracy of the generated code depends on the clarity and complexity of the screenshot.
For best result, use smaller parts of th: For best result, use smaller parts of the UI instead of a full-page screenshot.

After configuring the server, tell the A: After configuring the server, tell the AI model to .
This helps the LLM to better understand: This helps the LLM to better understand the design system and generate a higher quality UI. Knowing the exact size of components, their variants and how they they look like in practice, the LLM can make more informed decisions when generating code instead of guessing the styles just by looking at the name of the component.
Blueprint MCP server can generate a dais: Blueprint MCP server can generate a daisyUI code based on a figma design.
This is done by processing the propertie: This is done by processing the properties of the design elements, their styles, and layout from Figma API to LLM along with daisyUI component details so LLM can map the design to the closest daisyUI components.
This is a detailed prompt provided by Bl: This is a detailed prompt provided by Blueprint MCP server that helps AI to analyze existing Tailwind CSS code blocks, identify UI components, that can be replaced with daisyUI components, then it uses daisyUI MCP server to get the required components and finally generates the updated code with daisyUI components.
This works best with well-structured Tai: This works best with well-structured Tailwind CSS code and clear design specifications. For really complicated parts of your HTML, adding comments to the code can also help the AI understand the semantics better and produce more accurate results.
This is a detailed prompt provided by Bl: This is a detailed prompt provided by Blueprint MCP server that helps AI to analyze existing Bootstrap code blocks, identify UI components, that can be replaced with daisyUI components, then it uses daisyUI MCP server to get the required components and finally generates the updated code with daisyUI components.
This works best with well-structured Boo: This works best with well-structured Bootstrap code and clear design specifications. For really complicated parts of your HTML, adding comments to the code can also help the AI understand the semantics better and produce more accurate results.
Are you bad at color palettes? It was ne: Are you bad at color palettes? It was never easier to generate a custom daisyUI theme!
Attach any picture that you like its col: Attach any picture that you like its colors, and the AI will extract the color palette for you.
Then daisyUI MCP server will generate a: Then daisyUI MCP server will generate a custom daisyUI theme based on the extracted colors.
Blueprint MCP server includes layout exa: Blueprint MCP server includes layout examples and code blocks for useful design patterns.
For example if you're making a dashboard: For example if you're making a dashboard, Blueprint MCP will look into the possible layout structures and provide you the one that best fits your UI. And then it fills the layout with the appropriate daisyUI components.
Additonally, there are code blocks for c: Additonally, there are code blocks for combination of different UI pieces. For example, a responsive navbar with a button, a menu and a dropdown. It can be challenging to connect them all together, but Blueprint MCP provides ready-to-use code snippets to help you.
for higher code quality, faster LLM resu: for higher code quality, faster LLM results, and less token cost
